---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for this project
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: ""
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?

A clear and concise description of the problem or limitation. E.g. "I'm always
frustrated when [...]".

## Describe the solution you'd like

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Describe alternatives you've considered

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've
considered.

## Scope and impact

- [ ] This affects training
- [ ] This affects evaluation / metrics
- [ ] This affects the model architecture
- [ ] This affects the data pipeline
- [ ] This affects tooling / CI / docs

## Additional context

Add any other context, references, papers, or screenshots about the feature
request here.
